stories.title: AI Demand Forecasting
stories.challenge: Retail chain struggled with inaccurate demand prediction causing stockouts and overstock.
stories.solution: Built a machine learning forecasting pipeline using historical sales, seasonality and external signals.
stories.result: Reduced stockouts by 32% and improved inventory turnover by 21%.

stories.title: Fraud Detection System
stories.challenge: Financial platform needed real-time fraud detection for millions of transactions.
stories.solution: Implemented anomaly detection models with streaming data pipelines.
stories.result: Detected fraudulent activity 4x faster and reduced fraud losses by 18%.

stories.title: Customer Support AI
stories.challenge: Customer support teams faced heavy ticket volumes and slow response times.
stories.solution: Developed AI-powered chatbot integrated with knowledge base and ticket routing.

stories.title: Predictive Maintenance
stories.challenge: Frequent machine downtime caused operational inefficiencies.
stories.solution: IoT sensor data with predictive ML models for early failure detection.

stories.title: Personalized Recommendations
stories.challenge: Low product discovery and engagement on ecommerce platform.
stories.solution: Built recommendation engine using collaborative filtering and embeddings.
